markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on holiday ops, new content strategy, and January planning.](https://fathom.video/share/ssSqFyp7Z6_sFAHy-uCarDeRDfzpoCyy?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Content Pipeline:** A calibration article will be produced this week to test the new pipeline, which uses an API key to automate staging in Logic's CMS for faster, manual review.](https://fathom.video/share/ssSqFyp7Z6_sFAHy-uCarDeRDfzpoCyy?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)
  - [**Content Strategy Pivot:** Production will resume at \~5 articles/week in January, focusing on comparison content identified in a competitor gap analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/ssSqFyp7Z6_sFAHy-uCarDeRDfzpoCyy?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
  - [**Repositioning:** "Production API platform" is the working definition for Logic, pending a final decision. This language will be used for new content and to update past articles.](https://fathom.video/share/ssSqFyp7Z6_sFAHy-uCarDeRDfzpoCyy?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
  - [**Image Strategy:** A new two-image system will be adopted: a text-free blog image for better mobile display and a text-overlay social share image for better context.](https://fathom.video/share/ssSqFyp7Z6_sFAHy-uCarDeRDfzpoCyy?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Production

  - [**New Topic Clusters:** GrowthX created an Airtable with \~30 new article ideas based on the strategy pivot and a competitor gap analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/ssSqFyp7Z6_sFAHy-uCarDeRDfzpoCyy?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
  - [**Calibration Article:** One comparison article will be produced this week to test the new pipeline and gather feedback on brand positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/ssSqFyp7Z6_sFAHy-uCarDeRDfzpoCyy?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Comparison content is a key area where the system can misalign, making it an ideal test case.](https://fathom.video/share/ssSqFyp7Z6_sFAHy-uCarDeRDfzpoCyy?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
      - [**Reviewers:** Azzam and Steve will review for technical depth and strategic alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/ssSqFyp7Z6_sFAHy-uCarDeRDfzpoCyy?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [**Production Cadence:** Full production (\~5 articles/week) will resume in January.](https://fathom.video/share/ssSqFyp7Z6_sFAHy-uCarDeRDfzpoCyy?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)

### Content Repositioning & Updates

  - [**Logic Definition:** "Production API platform" is the temporary definition.](https://fathom.video/share/ssSqFyp7Z6_sFAHy-uCarDeRDfzpoCyy?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Avoids "automation" to prevent understating Logic's value.](https://fathom.video/share/ssSqFyp7Z6_sFAHy-uCarDeRDfzpoCyy?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
      - [**Status:** A final definition is pending an internal Logic meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/ssSqFyp7Z6_sFAHy-uCarDeRDfzpoCyy?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
  - [**Past Article Updates:** GrowthX will update a few past articles with the new language for review.](https://fathom.video/share/ssSqFyp7Z6_sFAHy-uCarDeRDfzpoCyy?tab=summary&timestamp=1314.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To prevent outdated messaging from being indexed by search engines.](https://fathom.video/share/ssSqFyp7Z6_sFAHy-uCarDeRDfzpoCyy?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)

### Pipeline Automation & Image Strategy

  - [**Automated Staging:** Logic will provide an API key to connect GrowthX's Atlas pipeline to Logic's CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/ssSqFyp7Z6_sFAHy-uCarDeRDfzpoCyy?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
      - [**Benefit:** Eliminates the manual publishing queue, enabling instant staging for review.](https://fathom.video/share/ssSqFyp7Z6_sFAHy-uCarDeRDfzpoCyy?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [**New Image Strategy:** A two-image system will be adopted.](https://fathom.video/share/ssSqFyp7Z6_sFAHy-uCarDeRDfzpoCyy?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
      - [**Blog Image:** A text-free visual for better mobile display.](https://fathom.video/share/ssSqFyp7Z6_sFAHy-uCarDeRDfzpoCyy?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
      - [**Social Share Image:** A text-overlay image for better context on social media.](https://fathom.video/share/ssSqFyp7Z6_sFAHy-uCarDeRDfzpoCyy?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)

### January Planning

  - [**Monthly Report:** Scheduled for late January to allow time for new articles to generate performance data.](https://fathom.video/share/ssSqFyp7Z6_sFAHy-uCarDeRDfzpoCyy?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)
  - [**2026 Planning Session:** Proposed for early January to align content strategy with Logic's updated goals.](https://fathom.video/share/ssSqFyp7Z6_sFAHy-uCarDeRDfzpoCyy?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)

### FYI: Logic's "12 Days of Christmas" Campaign

  - [Logic is launching a 12-day thought leadership campaign on Substack and LinkedIn.](https://fathom.video/share/ssSqFyp7Z6_sFAHy-uCarDeRDfzpoCyy?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)
  - [**Goal:** Generate high-level industry conversations.](https://fathom.video/share/ssSqFyp7Z6_sFAHy-uCarDeRDfzpoCyy?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [**Future Use:** Content may be repurposed into an ebook to fuel more SEO-driven articles.](https://fathom.video/share/ssSqFyp7Z6_sFAHy-uCarDeRDfzpoCyy?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Azzam:**](https://fathom.video/share/ssSqFyp7Z6_sFAHy-uCarDeRDfzpoCyy?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
      - [Select one comparison article from the Airtable for the calibration run.](https://fathom.video/share/ssSqFyp7Z6_sFAHy-uCarDeRDfzpoCyy?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
      - [Review the full list of \~30 new article ideas.](https://fathom.video/share/ssSqFyp7Z6_sFAHy-uCarDeRDfzpoCyy?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
  - [**Steve:**](https://fathom.video/share/ssSqFyp7Z6_sFAHy-uCarDeRDfzpoCyy?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
      - [Provide the API key for automated staging.](https://fathom.video/share/ssSqFyp7Z6_sFAHy-uCarDeRDfzpoCyy?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
      - [Review the calibration article and new topic list.](https://fathom.video/share/ssSqFyp7Z6_sFAHy-uCarDeRDfzpoCyy?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/ssSqFyp7Z6_sFAHy-uCarDeRDfzpoCyy?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)
      - [Produce the calibration article this week.](https://fathom.video/share/ssSqFyp7Z6_sFAHy-uCarDeRDfzpoCyy?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)
      - [Update a few past articles with the new language for review (by early next week).](https://fathom.video/share/ssSqFyp7Z6_sFAHy-uCarDeRDfzpoCyy?tab=summary&timestamp=1314.0)
      - [Send an async update doc this Friday detailing holiday coverage.](https://fathom.video/share/ssSqFyp7Z6_sFAHy-uCarDeRDfzpoCyy?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
